headline: Athene Names Larik Hall as Senior Vice President, Head of Athene Japan
summary: Experienced insurance executive brings deep U.S. and Japan market leadership to Athene’s growing international retirement platformWEST DES MOINES, Iowa, June 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Athene, the leading retirement solutions company and subsidiary of Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE:APO), today announced that Larik Hall has joined the company as Senior Vice President and Head of Japan.
